programs.title: Boon
programs.desc: Classic drama. Ken insists on taking the battle to the enemy when The Grand becomes the latest target of a local protection racket who vandalise the business.

programs.title: The Sweeney
programs.desc: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains.

programs.title: BattleBots
programs.desc: US robot combat series. Four challengers fight to the death, but only one can win to face Lock-Jaw and earn the chance to fight for the Golden Bolt.

programs.title: ITV Racing: Live from Chester
programs.desc: Live coverage of racing from Chester on the middle day of the May Meeting, presented by Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani.

programs.title: World of Sport
programs.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.

programs.title: The Protectors
programs.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Caroline plans revenge on behalf of a friend who has been swindled out of a 12th-century ivory icon by a trickster.
